titles.title: Down the Valley, up the Mountain

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Down the valley, up the mountain, Jerusalem is my home. Down the valley, up the mountain, Jerusalem is my home.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Home! Home, sweet home, Jerusalem is my home. Home! Home, sweet home, Jerusalem is my home.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are marching over to Jerusalem, We are marching over to Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Jerusalem.
